---
description: Generate a quality checklist for a feature.
---

Create `.specify/specs/<feature-id>/checklist.md` using `.specify/templates/checklist-template.md`.

Checklist guidance:
1. Validate requirement clarity and completeness.
2. Validate technical plan feasibility.
3. Validate delivery readiness (task ordering, verification, docs).
4. Keep checklist actionable with checkbox items only.

If feature artifacts are missing, include a short note describing prerequisites.
